messages.not_analyzed: Run a manual analysis to unlock the canonical historical state later. Recent provider data remains available now.
messages.queued: Analysis has been queued. Recent Overview remains available while the run starts.
messages.running: Analysis is running. Recent Overview remains visible while progress updates arrive.
messages.ready: Analysis metadata is up to date for this wallet.
messages.stale: The last successful analysis is older than seven days. Start a fresh run when you need current reconstructed history.
messages.failed: The last analysis run failed. You can retry without losing the recent Overview data already on screen.

reasons.providerPartial: One or more providers returned partial data
reasons.missingPrices: Some assets do not have current prices
reasons.noRecentActivity: No recent on-chain activity was found

assets.hiddenNoticeDescription: Overview keeps suspicious or low-confidence assets in the payload, but excludes them from default totals. {{visibleCount}} assets remain visible by default.
assets.hiddenInspectionDescription: These rows stay out of default totals until you reveal them for this session.
assets.hiddenOnlyTitle: Default view is hiding all current asset rows
assets.hiddenOnlyDescription: Reveal hidden assets to inspect low-confidence or suspicious rows without changing totals.
assets.filterHint: Use the asset filters above to reveal insecure, unpriced, or dust-value rows for this session.
assets.filteredUnpricedEmptyTitle: All current asset rows are missing prices
assets.filteredUnpricedEmptyDescription: Turn on the unpriced asset switch to inspect rows without prices. Default totals stay unchanged.
assets.filteredEmptyTitle: The current asset filters hide all rows
assets.filteredEmptyDescription: Adjust the insecure, unpriced, or dust-value switches to inspect more rows. Default totals stay unchanged.
assets.exclusionsSummary: {{count}} assets are excluded from default totals. Excluded priced value: {{value}}.
assets.noSecurityGuarantee: Trust labels help triage visibility. They are not a security guarantee.

states.emptyDescription: Connect a supported wallet or refresh to load the recent Overview.
states.providerFailureDescription: Provider data could not be loaded right now. Try again in a moment.
states.disconnectedTitle: Connect a wallet to open Overview
states.disconnectedDescription: Overview is only available for connected wallets on the supported network.
states.unsupportedChainDescription: This stage of Overview only supports Base mainnet.
states.emptyDistributionDescription: Distribution will appear once recent provider data is available.
states.emptyAssetsDescription: Recent balances will appear here after provider data is loaded.
states.emptyActivityDescription: Recent transfers and wallet activity will appear here when available.

errors.PROVIDER_REQUEST_FAILED: Providers rejected the recent Overview request.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_CHAIN: This chain is not supported for Overview yet.
errors.OVERVIEW_FAILED: Overview could not be rendered right now.
